div1.entryFree: Synod, assembly of a legislative body: it hath in solemn --s been decreed, both by the Syracusians and ourselves, Err. I, 1, 13. Particularly an assembly of the gods: thus Rosalind of many parts by heavenly s. was devised, As III, 2, 158. the glorious gods sit in hourly s. about thy particular prosperity, Cor. V, 2, 74. all you gods, in general s., take away her power, Hml. II, 2, 516. gods and goddesses, all the whole s. of them, Ant. III, 10, 5. we poor ghosts will cry to the shining s. of the rest against thy deity, Cymb. V, 4, 89.
